generated_exposure.exposure_text:
🚨 Critical Alert: Foreign Influence in Our Defense Systems 🚨

As we push for strategic autonomy, we must stay vigilant. Recent reports reveal that foreign actors are exploiting our reliance on external tech for critical infrastructure. One breach in our supply chain could leave us vulnerable. It's our duty to ensure our defense systems are truly autonomous and secure. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
